## Notes

- This audit is API-layer only: OpenAPI -> frontend usage -> fixture keys.
- Product-level feature mapping belongs to `docs/engineering/traceability-matrix.md`.
- If a used route is missing from happy fixtures, mock-api may fall back to Prism-generated responses.
